// Generated by Framer (c85c929) export default function metadata(params,activeLocale){return{description:"Stubby became the most decorated war dog of World War I and was promoted to sergeant for his bravery.",favicon:"/framerusercontent.com/assets/MPqNQETYRusncJDhi8AZeE.png",robots:"max-image-preview:large",socialImage:"/framerusercontent.com/assets/MPqNQETYRusncJDhi8AZeE.png",title:"SGT STUBBY"};}export const metadataVersion=1; export const __FramerMetadata__ = {"exports":{"metadataVersion":{"type":"variable","annotations":{"framerContractVersion":"1"}},"default":{"type":"function","annotations":{"framerContractVersion":"1"}},"__FramerMetadata__":{"type":"variable"}}}
